data.body: Epic plan-review: round1 BLOCK(G6 text-drift gap) -> remediated (0435 now extracts+runs literal README quickstart commands; epic mechanism subsection added). round2 PASS with advisories -> remediated all valid: consolidated duplicate AC (E2), added 0435 depends_on a41f+b55f (T3/G4), reworded 9d81/6755 ACs to break circular f088 ref (G4-critical), pinned b55f to runnable end-to-end path (P6), extended ordering note to test.yml+docs/README (G4). Re-running review to re-sign, then claim epic.
